requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.subIntro: Sub-requirements belong to this requirement. Create them here; they are stored with this parent automatically (no extra linking step).
requirements.subEmpty: No sub-requirements yet. Add one using the form above.
requirements.subParentLabel: Parent requirement (this sub-req is linked to)
requirements.subFormLead: Create a sub-requirement under the requirement above. It is saved as a child of {{key}} — you do not pick a parent in a list.
requirements.rowClickHint: Click a row key or use Open to go to the detail page where you add sub-requirements.

tests.title: Verification tests
tests.writeHint: Create tests here and choose whether they verify this requirement or a sub-requirement below. The API stores the link automatically.
tests.writeHintDetail: Define the test case (precondition, action, expected result, method). Link it to this requirement, a sub-requirement, or leave unlinked (standalone). Standalone tests also appear on the Tests page.
tests.standaloneLead: Creates a verification test with no link to a requirement or sub-requirement. You can filter these on the Tests list.
tests.referenceLinked: Linked to a requirement or sub-requirement
tests.reportLaterHint: Status and actual result are not part of the test definition; set them when you record a test run or execution.
tests.pickSub: Choose which sub-requirement the test should verify.
tests.listOnPage: All tests for this requirement and its sub-requirements
tests.emptyOnDetail: No tests yet. Use the form above.

overview.title: All requirements and sub-requirements
overview.lead: Each block is one requirement; indented lines are its sub-requirements. Open a requirement to add tests and sub-requirements.
